blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,768 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 61°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
